conflicting_permission_pairs.name: Vendor Creation & Payment Approval Conflict
conflicting_permission_pairs.description: Prevents a user from creating a fictitious vendor and then approving a payment to that vendor.

conflicting_permission_pairs.name: PO Creation & Goods Receipt Conflict
conflicting_permission_pairs.description: Prevents a user from creating a purchase order and then confirming receipt of the goods, which could hide missing inventory.

conflicting_permission_pairs.name: GL Entry Creation & Posting Conflict
conflicting_permission_pairs.description: Prevents a user from creating and posting a journal entry directly without secondary review.

conflicting_permission_pairs.name: System Admin & Log Deletion Conflict
conflicting_permission_pairs.description: Prevents a system administrator from performing configuration changes and then deleting the audit trails.

split_transaction_detection.description: Detects transactions split into multiple smaller amounts (each under the $10,000 threshold) made by the same user to the same vendor within 24 hours.
